_note: Tracks all data sources across every department. OAuth connections are managed in connections.json. Update 'status' here as you connect sources. Do not store credentials or tokens in this file.

sources.label: Resume File
sources.notes: Place your resume PDF at data/documents/resume.pdf, then register it via POST /api/documents/register.

sources.label: Cover Letter Template
sources.notes: Place cover letter template at data/documents/. Resu-Mate uses this to generate tailored letters.

sources.label: LinkedIn Job Feed
sources.notes: LinkedIn API requires approval. Coming in future phase.

sources.label: Dice.com Job Feed
sources.notes: Dice API integration planned. Will require API key.

sources.label: Indeed Job Feed
sources.notes: Indeed Publisher API planned. Requires publisher account.

sources.label: Budget File
sources.notes: Export your budget spreadsheet to JSON or CSV and place at data/documents/budget.json.

sources.label: Bank Account (Plaid)
sources.notes: Plaid integration planned for read-only bank data. Requires Plaid API key (backend only).

sources.label: Bills List
sources.notes: Create data/documents/bills.json with your recurring bills list.

sources.label: Google Calendar
sources.notes: OAuth connection. Run backend auth flow to connect. See connections.json for OAuth details.

sources.label: Gmail Inbox
sources.notes: Read-only Gmail access. Token stored backend-only. Never exposed to frontend.

sources.label: Task List (Local)
sources.notes: Export tasks from any task manager or create manually.

sources.label: Nmap (Local Tool)
sources.notes: Set nmap_path in company_config.json. Safe mode restricts targets to lab ranges only.

sources.label: System Logs
sources.notes: Set log_locations in company_config.json (security section) to point to local log files.

sources.label: GitHub Security Events
sources.notes: Read-only security event monitoring for repositories.

sources.label: Etsy Shop
sources.notes: Etsy API v3. OAuth token stored backend-only. Provides listings, orders, stats.

sources.label: TikTok Creator
sources.notes: TikTok API for hashtag research and content performance. Token backend-only.

sources.label: Product Catalog (Local)
sources.notes: Maintain a local product catalog file for Pixel and Forge to reference.

sources.label: Google Drive
sources.notes: Read-only access to Drive documents. Token backend-only.
